ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was created */,
  "pic" TEXT /* Path to the image associated with the post */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption provided by the user for the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes received by the post */,
  "post_by_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the post */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Count of comments associated with the post */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was shared */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., image, video, text) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_post_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "reply_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to (if applicable) */,
  "comment_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the like was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the media */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the media file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the media was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of media file (e.g., image, video, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignment" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignment_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignment_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who receives the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for reporting the post */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was made */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the report resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post that was shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the post */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the share occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* ID of the post being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the post */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the post */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for the analytics (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "timeframe")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
